title: TUCKER MAXON SCHOOL - 211info
text: TUCKER MAXON SCHOOL TUCKER MAXON SCHOOL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides education for children from preschool through 5th grade. Brings together children with hearing loss and those with typical hearing in small, collaborative classrooms. With early diagnosis, intervention, and support like hearing aids and cochlear implants, deaf and hard-of-hearing students build strong listening and speaking skills. Children with typical hearing benefit from low student-teacher ratios and an environment where personal attention is built in. 2860 SE Holgate Boulevard Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Deaf and hearing children from ages 3 to 5th grade Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (503) 235-6551 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 235-6551 Voice Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: $125 registration fee. Offers financial assistance to those families with a deaf or hard of hearing student based on their demonstrated need. Completion of financial assistance application is required for documentation. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Preschools Public Special Schools * Deafness Other Services Offered At This Location: REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - EARLY INTERVENTION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
